blocks.text: Quick add to Amy Carter's note before you reply. While you settle which figures we quote, I want to get a working session on the calendar so we can pressure-test the full message set with you in the room rather than trade it over email.
A few things to make that hour count:

items: Send two or three windows late this month that suit your calendar; thirty minutes is plenty on our end.
Bring whoever owns the {{fact:f:E-2023-001.client}} board narrative, since that is the audience this language has to survive.
No prep needed beyond the two numbers Amy Carter flagged; we walk in with the draft.
